summary.key_theme: 儘管 Meta 第一季財報營收獲利雙雙優於預期，但市場對其高達 1450 億美元的 AI 資本支出前景感到擔憂，導致股價出現顯著回調。

bullish.title: Meta Platforms Inc (META) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and AI Advancements
bullish.reason: 公司第一季營收與獲利表現強勁，顯示核心廣告業務與 AI 整合策略具備長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer: Don’t let Meta’s post-earnings plunge scare you out of the stock
bullish.reason: 知名分析師 Jim Cramer 強調應關注 Zuckerberg 的長期願景，認為短期股價下跌是投資人過度反應。

bullish.title: Billionaire Philippe Laffont Loves Meta Platforms (META): Should You Buy Post-Earnings Dip?
bullish.reason: 億萬富翁投資人 Philippe Laffont 持續看好 Meta，為市場提供信心支撐。

bullish.title: UBS Highlights Generative AI as Key Revenue Driver for Meta Platforms, Inc. (META)
bullish.reason: 瑞銀指出生成式 AI 將成為 Meta 未來關鍵營收驅動力，肯定其技術轉型方向。

bullish.title: Meta Platforms Just Made a Brilliant Move the Market Will Likely Read Wrong
bullish.reason: 評論認為市場對 Meta 的資本支出策略存在誤解，長期價值被低估。

bearish.title: Meta's AI Spending Spree: Why the Stock is Diving Despite Record Profits
bearish.reason: Meta 揭露高達 1450 億美元的 AI 資本支出計畫，引發市場對獲利能力遭稀釋的嚴重擔憂，導致股價大跌。

bearish.title: Meta Raises 2026 CapEx Forecast Amid High Component Pricing; First-Quarter Results Top Views
bearish.reason: 資本支出預測上調，反映硬體成本壓力上升，直接抵銷了財報優於預期的利多。

bearish.title: Goldman’s Eric Sheridan explains why he lowered Meta’s price target
bearish.reason: 高盛分析師 Eric Sheridan 因應資本支出增加而下調目標價，對股價短期動能造成壓力。

bearish.title: How US Stock Markets Rewarded Google But Punished Meta After Q1 Earnings
bearish.reason: 市場將 Meta 與 Alphabet 進行對比，認為 Meta 在 AI 支出效率上表現較差，導致資金流出。

bearish.title: Meta shares sink as capex grows: Here's what investors need to know
bearish.reason: 媒體報導聚焦於資本支出增加對股價的負面衝擊，加劇市場恐慌情緒。

neutral.title: Why Meta is paying some creators in stablecoins — not cash
neutral.reason: Meta 嘗試以穩定幣支付創作者，屬於營運細節調整，對整體財務影響有限。

neutral.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Blue Owl, Qualcomm, Hertz, Eli Lilly, Meta Platforms, Microsoft & more
neutral.reason: 僅為盤中熱門股整理，無實質分析內容。

neutral.title: Meta shopping around $20-25 billion bond offering, sources say
neutral.reason: 發行債券為常見的資本運作，市場反應中性。

neutral.title: Amazon vs. Meta: Which Stock Will Win Over the Next Decade?
neutral.reason: 長線比較分析，對短期股價影響不明顯。

neutral.title: The mega-cap winners and losers: Alphabet and Meta
neutral.reason: 針對大型科技股的辯論，屬於市場評論性質。
